observation.summary: Server-facing metadata docs described a C10/C11 privacy boundary by hand while the executable allowlist and Go projection shape lived in hostintegration.

hypothesis.summary: A verifier can render the reader doc from the privacy metadata allowlist and prove the server-facing struct shape still matches the allowlist.

execution.summary: Run privacymetadata to validate source checks, allowlist surfaces, struct JSON paths, and generated doc drift.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects missing surfaces, server-facing struct path drift, missing privacy tests, and reader doc drift.

retrospective.summary: C10/C11 privacy metadata knowledge becomes generated from the allowlist instead of a manually maintained field table.

evidence.proves: privacy metadata doc matches the executable allowlist and Go server-facing metadata shape
public CI uploads privacy metadata evidence
